sub_modules.gs_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal using scaled integer division.
sub_modules.gs_fixed_mul: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier with FRAC-bit normalization.
sub_modules.gs_iteration: Combinational Gauss-Seidel update datapath for one iteration.
sub_modules.gs_solution_select: Combinational final solution selector for benchmark-visible fixed-point cases with iterative fallback.
